Photography · Film · Press

Stills, film,
and the press.

The visual record of a life spent on one breath — competition and training imagery from Soufrière Bay, film from the channels, and a place for press and licensing. All stills by Allie Reilly unless noted.

I · Stills
II · Film

Dives & depth diariesWatch on YouTube
YouTube @harrymccahillfreediver Films & depth diaries → Instagram @harrymccahill Stills & reels → TikTok @harryomccahill Short film → Facebook /harrymccahillfreediver Updates & community →
III · Press & licensing

For journalists,
filmmakers & brands.

Available for interviews, features, expert comment on freediving and ocean conservation, and on-camera work. High-resolution images and a media kit are available on request.

Image licensing for editorial and commercial use — please get in touch with the intended usage.

Press enquiries Partnership one-pager
  • Competitive freediver — 8th in the world, CNF
  • British national record holder
  • AIDA Master Instructor, Blue Element Freediving
  • Astrophysics graduate · former GB Rowing trialist
  • Based in Dominica · available worldwide
